Class CollectionManager<K extends Comparable<K>, T extends Product>

java.lang.Object
src.basecollection.CollectionManager<K,T>
Type Parameters:
K - the type of keys used in the collection, must be Comparable
T - the type of products stored in the collection, must extend Product
public class CollectionManager<K extends Comparable<K>, T extends Product> extends Object
Manages a collection of products stored in a Hashtable. Provides operations for manipulating and querying the collection.

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clear()
    Clears all products from the collection.
    void

    Counts products with price greater than the specified value.

    exit()
    Exits the application.

    Returns the collection initialization date and time.

    Returns the products hashtable.
    void
    help()
    Displays help information for all available commands.
    void
    info()
    Displays information about the collection (type, initialization date, size).
    void
    insert(K key)
    Inserts a new product with the specified key using default product client manager.
    void
    insert(K key, ProductClientManager<T> productClientManager)
    Inserts a new product with the specified key using the given product client manager.
    void
    printFieldDescendingPrice()
    Prints all product prices in descending order.
    void

    Prints all unique unit of measure values present in the collection.

    removeGreaterKey(K comparedKey)
    Removes all products with keys greater than the specified key.
    void
    removeKey(K key)
    Removes a product with the specified key.
    void
    removeLower()
    Removes all products lower than the default product client manager's product.
    void
    removeLower(ProductClientManager<T> productClientManager)
    Removes all products lower than the specified product client manager's product.
    void
    replaceIfGreater(K key)
    Replaces a product if the new product is greater than the existing one, using default client manager.
    void
    replaceIfGreater(K key, ProductClientManager<T> productClientManager)
    Replaces a product if the new product is greater than the existing one.
    void
    save()
    Saves the collection to a file using the file manager.
    void
    setFileManager(AbstractFileManager<Hashtable<K,T>> fileManager)
    Sets the file manager for saving/loading the collection.
    void
    setIdManager(LongIdManager<T> idManager)
    Sets the ID manager for managing product IDs.
    void
    setKeyParser(ParseKey<K> keyParser)
    Sets the key parser for parsing string keys.
    void
    setProductClientManager(ProductClientManager<T> productClientManager)
    Sets the product client manager.
    void
    setProducts(Hashtable<K,T> products)
    Sets the products hashtable.
    void
    show()
    Displays all elements in the collection.
    void
    update(long id)
    Updates a product with the specified ID using default product client manager.
    void
    update(long id, ProductClientManager<T> productClientManager)
    Updates a product with the specified ID using the given product client manager.

      Returns the products hashtable.

      the current products hashtable

      Returns the collection initialization date and time.

      the LocalDateTime of initialization

      productClientManager - the product client manager to use

      Returns the product client manager.

      the current product client manager

      the current ID manager

      Inserts a new product with the specified key using default product client manager.

      key - the key for the new product

      Inserts a new product with the specified key using the given product client manager.
      Parameters:
      key - the key for the new product
      productClientManager - the product client manager to use

    • update

      public void update(long id)
      Updates a product with the specified ID using default product client manager.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the product to update

    • update

      public void update(long id, ProductClientManager<T> productClientManager)
      Updates a product with the specified ID using the given product client manager.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the product to update
      productClientManager - the product client manager to use

      public void removeKey(K key)
      Removes a product with the specified key.
      Parameters:
      key - the key of the product to remove

      public void clear()
      Clears all products from the collection.

      public void save()
      Saves the collection to a file using the file manager.

      public void exit()
      Exits the application.

      public void removeLower()
      Removes all products lower than the default product client manager's product.

    • removeLower

      public void removeLower(ProductClientManager<T> productClientManager)
      Removes all products lower than the specified product client manager's product.
      Parameters:
      productClientManager - the product client manager providing the comparison product

    • replaceIfGreater

      public void replaceIfGreater(K key)
      Replaces a product if the new product is greater than the existing one, using default client manager.
      Parameters:
      key - the key of the product to potentially replace

    • replaceIfGreater

      public void replaceIfGreater(K key, ProductClientManager<T> productClientManager)
      Replaces a product if the new product is greater than the existing one.
      Parameters:
      key - the key of the product to potentially replace
      productClientManager - the product client manager providing the new product

    • removeGreaterKey

      public void removeGreaterKey(K comparedKey)
      Removes all products with keys greater than the specified key.
      Parameters:
      comparedKey - the key to compare against

    • countGreaterThanPrice

      public void countGreaterThanPrice(long price)
      Counts products with price greater than the specified value.
      Parameters:
      price - the price threshold

      public void printUniqueUnitOfMeasure()
      Prints all unique unit of measure values present in the collection.

    • printFieldDescendingPrice

      public void printFieldDescendingPrice()
      Prints all product prices in descending order.
